title.original: Laboratory confirms 2 hantavirus pulmonary syndrome cases in Chile
title.translated_zh: 实验室确认智利 2 例汉坦病毒肺综合征病例

content.excerpt: The authority reported 2 laboratory-confirmed cases of hantavirus pulmonary syndrome in Chile and announced epidemiological investigation.
content.original_excerpt: The authority reported 2 laboratory-confirmed cases of hantavirus pulmonary syndrome in Chile and announced epidemiological investigation.

content.translation_text: The authority reported 2 laboratory-confirmed cases of hantavirus pulmonary syndrome in Chile and announced epidemiological investigation.
content.translated_excerpt_zh: 该机构报告智利出现 2 例经实验室确认的汉坦病毒肺综合征病例，并宣布开展流行病学调查。

sentences.text: The authority reported 2 laboratory-confirmed cases of hantavirus pulmonary syndrome in Chile and announced epidemiological investigation.

display_summary.zh: 智利卫生机构报告 2 例实验室确认病例，并启动流行病学调查。
display_summary.en: The Chilean authority reported 2 laboratory-confirmed cases and initiated an epidemiological investigation.

what_changed.what_changed: 本次通报新增 2 例实验室确认病例及调查行动。

source_content_quality.note: Demo 只提供一条官方通报证据句。
